zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wynslowe於1375年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親John Wyncelowe43歲，母親Mary Crouchman11372歲。他於1391年與Agnes Poure在英國英格蘭奧可福爾貝布洛可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wynslowe于1375年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲John Wyncelowe43岁，母亲Mary Crouchman11372岁。他于1391年与Agnes Poure在英国英格兰奧可福爾貝布洛可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wynslowe was born in 1375, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, John Wyncelowe, was 43 and his mother, Mary Crouchman, was 11372. He married Agnes Poure in 1391, in Begbroke, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wynslowe est né en 1375, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Wyncelowe, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mary Crouchman, avait 11372 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Poure en 1391, à Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Wynslowe 1375 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wyncelowe 43 und seine Mutter Mary Crouchman 11372. Er hat 1391 in Begbroke, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Poure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wynslowe è nato il nel 1375 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, John Wyncelowe, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Mary Crouchman, aveva 11372 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Poure nel 1391, nel Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: William Wynsloweが1375年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父John Wynceloweは43歳，母Mary Crouchmanは11372歳であった。1391年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアベグブロクでAgnes Poureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Wynslowe(이)가 1375년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wyncelowe(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Crouchman(은)는 11372세였다. 그는 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 베그브로크에서 Agnes Poure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wynslowe nasceu em 1375, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wyncelowe, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mary Crouchman, tinha 11372 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Poure em 1391, em Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wynslowe родился в 1375 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wyncelowe было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Crouchman, 11372. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Poure в 1391 г. в местности бегброк, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wynslowe nació en 1375, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Wyncelowe, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mary Crouchman, tenía 11372 años. Se casó con Agnes Poure en 1391, en Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
